prompt: Generate a detailed CAD model rendering of a sleek modern tablet. Use the overhead perspective and slightly tilted composition from the reference image. Show a technical wireframe view on the screen with professional lighting.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed CAD model rendering of a sleek, modern white tablet. The tablet's perspective and slightly tilted composition should precisely match image 1. Display a clear, technical wireframe view of a complex 3D object on the tablet's screen. The rendering should feature professional studio lighting to highlight the tablet's design and the on-screen wireframe detail.
objects: Tablet with the perspective and tilted composition precisely matching image 1
Tablet screen displaying a clear, technical wireframe view
Complex 3D object (rendered as wireframe) on the tablet screen
CAD model rendering style applied to the tablet
Background surface (matching the compositional layout of image 1)
